esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-airflow.otel-default*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "airflow.otel"
| WHERE airflow.scheduler.scheduler_loop_duration IS NOT NULL
// Timer values are in SECONDS (OTel statsd receiver convention)
// Threshold 60 = 60 seconds; adjust for your environment
| STATS max_loop_sec = MAX(airflow.scheduler.scheduler_loop_duration)
| WHERE max_loop_sec > 60
